description_long: This is a vintage black coupe car with a boxy, upright body and a high roof, reminiscent of early 20th-century automobiles such as the Ford Model T. The car features a prominent rectangular front grille, round headlamps, and thin, spoked wheels with visible fenders. The side profile reveals two doors and a single large side window per side, with a simple, utilitarian design and minimal ornamentation. The rear of the car includes a small rectangular window and a wooden trunk or storage box mounted above the rear bumper. The paint is glossy black, with some brown accents on the rear storage area and subtle metallic details on the wheels and trim. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, classic vehicle designed for private urban transportation in the early automotive era.
description: A vintage black coupe car with a high roof, spoked wheels, and a wooden rear trunk, evoking early 20th-century automotive design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular grille, round headlamps, and narrow front fenders.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, large side window, and spoked wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the small rectangular rear window and the wooden trunk mounted above the bumper.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, side window, and overall boxy silhouette.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with one large side window per side
